title: Kimi K2.7 Code: THIS is VERY CRAZY MAN!
summary: Moonshot AI released Kimi K2.7 Code, an open-source agentic model for coding tasks built on a Mixture-of-Experts architecture with one trillion parameters. The model supports a 256K context window and ships with a CLI tool for repository exploration, file editing, and test execution, plus a subscription plan with refreshed weekly quota.
writeup: The video covers Moonshot AI's release of Kimi K2.7 Code, an open-source agentic coding model built on a Mixture-of-Experts architecture with one trillion parameters and a 256K context window. It ships with a CLI tool for repository exploration, file editing, and test execution, along with a subscription plan that refreshes its quota weekly. The takeaway is a large open-weight model aimed at agentic coding workflows, with the long context supporting work across sizable codebases.
